title: jasminum thomense
intro: Jasminum thomense, also known as the Cape jasmine or Gauri, is a species of flowering plant in the jasmine family. Traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jasminum thomense include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and other hormonal imbalances. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tonics, or dried and used in capsules or tinctures.
